transcript.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes. Para español, oprima el dos.
Hi, I'd like to schedule an appointment
Part of
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.
pretty good AI.
Am I speaking with Jordan?
Oh, I’m sorry, I think you might have the wrong number. I’m actually just a patient looking to schedule a checkup appointment. Could you help me with that?
May I have your first name, last name, and date of birth?
Sure, my first name is Alex, last name Johnson, and my date of birth is March 12th, 1985.
I heard your birthday is March 12th, 1985.
Is that correct?
Yes, that’s correct. March 12th, 1985.
I'm not able to find your information in our system right now.
I'll connect you to our patient support team so they can help you schedule your checkup.
Please stay on the line.
Alright, I’ll hold on. Thank you.
laj
Hi, I'd like to schedule an appointment for a checkup, please.
I'm unable to schedule your appointment directly since I can't find your information in our system.
For new patients, please call the clinic directly during business hours so the team can help you get set up and book your checkup.
Is there anything else I can help with?
I understand. Thanks for letting me know. Just to confirm, could you give me the clinic’s direct number or the best time to call during business hours? That would really help.
Pivot Point Orthopedics is open Monday, Tuesday and Thursday from 9 am to 4 pm, Wednesday from 12 pm to 7 pm.
and Friday from 9 a.m. to 12 p.m. all Central Time.
You can reach the clinic directly at 844
Got it, thank you so much for that information. I’ll give them a call during their hours to set up my checkup. I really appreciate the help.
You're welcome.
If you have any other questions, feel free to call back.
Have a great day!
Thanks, you too! Take care.
